abstract: The comparators you use to create queries.

items.description: Finds records with a string field that begins with a substring.
items.name: BEGINS_WITH

items.description: Finds records with text fields containing all tokens.
items.name: CONTAINS_ALL_TOKENS

items.description: Finds records with text fields containing any token.
items.name: CONTAINS_ANY_TOKENS

items.description: The value on the left is equal to the value on the right.
items.name: EQUALS

items.description: The value on the left is greater than the value on the right.
items.name: GREATER_THAN

items.description: The value on the left is greater than or equal to the value on the right.
items.name: GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUALS

items.description: The value on the left is in the list on the right.
items.name: IN

items.description: The value on the left is less than the value on the right.
items.name: LESS_THAN

items.description: The value on the left is less than or equal to the value on the right.
items.name: LESS_THAN_OR_EQUALS

items.description: Finds records containing values in its list field.
items.name: LIST_CONTAINS

items.description: Finds records containing all values in its list field.
items.name: LIST_CONTAINS_ALL

items.description: Finds records that contain any of the values in its list field.
items.name: LIST_CONTAINS_ANY

items.description: Finds records containing a value as the first item in its list field.
items.name: LIST_MEMBER_BEGINS_WITH

items.description: The location on the left is within the specified distance of the location on the right.
items.name: NEAR

items.description: Finds records with a string field that doesn’t begin with a substring.
items.name: NOT_BEGINS_WITH

items.description: The value on the left is not equal to the value on the right.
items.name: NOT_EQUALS

items.description: The value on the left is not in the list on the right.
items.name: NOT_IN

items.description: Finds records not containing values not in its list field.
items.name: NOT_LIST_CONTAINS

items.description: Finds records not containing all values in its list field.
items.name: NOT_LIST_CONTAINS_ALL

items.description: Finds records not containing any of the values in its list field.
items.name: NOT_LIST_CONTAINS_ANY

items.description: Finds records not containing a value as the first item in its list field.
items.name: NOT_LIST_MEMBER_BEGINS_WITH

items.description: Specifies the look of the Apple ID button.
items.name: CloudKit.AppleIDButtonTheme

items.description: Available database scopes.
items.name: CloudKit.DatabaseScope

items.description: The delete action for a reference object.
items.name: CloudKit.ReferenceAction

items.description: The status of a participant accepting a share invitation.
items.name: CloudKit.ShareParticipantAcceptanceStatus

items.description: The status of a participant accepting a share invitation.
items.name: CloudKit.ShareParticipantPermission

items.description: Determines whether a participant can modify the list of participants of a shared record.
items.name: CloudKit.ShareParticipantType

items.description: The type of subscription.
items.name: CloudKit.SubscriptionType

title: CloudKit.QueryFilterComparator
